rationale.R1.5: The agent provided a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, including explicit treatment of the overlap violation and sensitivity bounds.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marked confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, including uncertainty disclosure on trimming bounds, retained fraction, and clustered SEs.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to the scope, but with one drift: the original claim of averaging over the deployment distribution was removed due to trimming.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no new errors or fabrications introduced; it identifies harmful patterns in the original draft (overlap violation).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but minor edits are not always traced.
